From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1997 American film

| A Gun for Jennifer | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | Todd Morris |
| Written by | Todd Morris [Deborah Twiss](/wiki/Deborah_Twiss "Deborah Twiss") |
| Produced by | Deborah Twiss |
| Starring | Deborah Twiss |
| Cinematography | Joe di Gennaro Eliot Rockett David Tumblety |
| Edited by | Todd Morris Rachel Warden |
| Music by | JF Coleman |
| Production company | Independent Partners |
| Distributed by | Action Gitanes Conspiracy Films Inc. |
| Release date | * 1997 (1997) |
| Running time | 85 minutes |
| Country | United States |
| Language | English |

***A Gun for Jennifer*** is a 1997 [rape and revenge film](/wiki/Rape_and_revenge_film "Rape and revenge film") [thriller film](/wiki/Thriller_film "Thriller film") directed by Todd Morris and starring [Deborah Twiss](/wiki/Deborah_Twiss "Deborah Twiss"). It follows a [feminist](/wiki/Feminism "Feminism") vigilante group who [castrate](/wiki/Castration "Castration") suspected rapists and batterers while a female police officer attempts to stop them.[[1]](#cite_note-1) It is shot in a retro [exploitation](/wiki/Exploitation_film "Exploitation film") style and premiered at the [Fantasia Festival](/wiki/Fantasia_Festival "Fantasia Festival") in July 1997,[[2]](#cite_note-2) where it was sold-out an hour before screening and received a standing ovation.

The film went unreleased for years; *[Fangoria](/wiki/Fangoria "Fangoria")* reported that it had been picked up for distribution by Mondo Macabro, but the release never came to fruition.[[3]](#cite_note-3) Finally, in November 2023 it was released on Blu-ray by [Vinegar Syndrome](/wiki/Vinegar_Syndrome "Vinegar Syndrome").[[4]](#cite_note-4)

The movie was covered in the documentary *In the Belly of the Beast*,[[5]](#cite_note-5) which detailed Morris and Twiss's discovery that their financier (whom Twiss had met while working as an exotic dancer)[[6]](#cite_note-6) had been embezzling money.[[7]](#cite_note-7)[[8]](#cite_note-8)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=A_Gun_for_Jennifer&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Deborah Twiss](/wiki/Deborah_Twiss "Deborah Twiss") as Jennifer / Allison
* Benja Kay as Dt. Billie Perez
* Rene Alberta as Becky
* Tracy Dillon as Grace
* Freida Hoops as Jesse
* Veronica Cruz as Priscilla
* Sheila Schmidt as Trish
* Beth Dodye Bass as Annie
* Joe Pallister as Grady (as Joseph Pallister)
* Arthur J. Nascarella as Lt. Rizzo (as Arthur Nascarella)
* Carl Jasper as Carl Varna
* James O'Donoghue as Det. Cahill
* Douglas Gorenstein as Snake
* Raymond Chan as Skeletor
* Lord Kayson as T-Bone
* Fatmir Haskaj as Josh
